headline: MoneyLion One Launches Premium Banking Helping Everyday Americans Earn More from Every Paycheck
summary: MoneyLion today announced the launch of MoneyLion One, a premium financial membership program empowering hardworking Americans to earn more from every paycheck. Members access daily cashback, fee-free investing and high-yield savings (coming late summer), along with a suite of personalized financial and identity theft protection tools. Currently, more than half of Americans live paycheck to paycheck. These benefits are designed to reduce financial stress today while accelerating long-term financ
